title: Financial Housing Options
content:
Housing and Residence Life - Options, Rates, and Application
Morgan State University

---

RESIDENCE HALLS

Morgan State University offers several residence halls for students:

Traditional Residence Halls:
- Baldwin Hall
- Blount Towers
- Cummings House
- Harper-Tubman House
- Marble Hall
- O'Connell Hall
- Rawlings Hall
- Thurgood Marshall Hall

Suite-Style Housing:
- Morgan View (Apartments)

---

ROOM TYPES AND RATES (Per Semester)

Traditional Double Room:
- Standard accommodations
- Shared room with one roommate
- Community bathrooms on floor

Traditional Single Room:
- Private room
- Community bathrooms on floor
- Limited availability

Suite-Style:
- Semi-private bathrooms
- Multiple bedroom configurations
- Living area

Apartment-Style:
- Full kitchen
- Living room
- Private or shared bedrooms

---

HOUSING APPLICATION PROCESS

1. Accept admission to Morgan State University
2. Pay enrollment deposit
3. Complete housing application online
4. Pay housing deposit
5. Select room during room selection period
6. Complete roommate matching (if desired)

---

HOUSING DEADLINES

- Priority Housing Deadline: Check with Office of Residence Life
- Room Selection: Dates announced each semester
- Housing Deposit: Required to secure room assignment

---

OFFICE OF RESIDENCE LIFE CONTACT

For Room & Board refunds and housing questions, contact the Office of Residence Life.

Website: https://www.morgan.edu/residence-life
